hero.subtitle: Deploy AI models on your own hardware. No cloud dependency. No data leakage. No monthly compute tax. Full control.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.cloudTaxDesc: You're paying $2,000–$15,000/month for AI APIs that train on your data and raise prices annually. Your competitive advantage is funding someone else's infrastructure.
problem.dataLeakageDesc: Every API call sends your proprietary data to third-party servers. Client records, trade secrets, and competitive intelligence — exposed with every query.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.localStackDesc: Enterprise-grade AI running on hardware you own, in a building you control, with models you choose. Zero data leaves your premises.
solution.agnosticDesc: Deploy Llama 3, Mistral, Claude, or any open model. Switch freely. No vendor lock-in. Your infrastructure, your choice.

verticals.title: Sovereign AI for
verticals.legalDesc: Attorney-client privilege preserved. AI-powered contract analysis, eDiscovery, and legal research — all on-premises.
verticals.medicalDesc: HIPAA-compliant AI for clinical documentation, medical coding, and patient communication — no PHI leaves your network.
verticals.autoDesc: FTC Safeguards Rule compliant. AI for inventory, deal desk, and customer engagement across every rooftop.
verticals.tradesDesc: AI estimating, scheduling, and crew management for contractors. Works offline. Integrates with ServiceTitan.

pricing.title: Transparent
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No "call for quote." Enterprise-grade AI at SMB-accessible pricing.

cta.title: Ready to Own Your
cta.subtitle: Stop renting intelligence. Start owning it. Book a technical consultation to see the TechFides Stack running on hardware you control.

footer.tagline: Enterprise AI. Local Infrastructure. Total Sovereignty.

solutions.pageSubtitle: Every vertical has unique compliance requirements, workflows, and pain points. We build sovereign AI deployments tailored to your industry.
solutions.dontSeeDesc: Our Agnostic Engine deploys to any vertical. If your business handles sensitive data and you're tired of the cloud tax — we can help.

stack.pageSubtitle: A full-stack, model-agnostic AI deployment platform. Every layer is designed for security, performance, and total sovereignty.

partners.pageSubtitle: Earn recurring revenue by connecting businesses with sovereign AI infrastructure. No technical skills required.

consulting.pageSubtitle: Before deploying sovereign AI, some organizations need strategic groundwork. TechFides' consulting frameworks — built from decades of Fortune 500 leadership — prepare your business for transformation.
